name: Guojin Xinxin Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund (LOF)
summary: Guojin Xinxin Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund (LOF) is a fund managed by Guojin Asset Management, categorized as a "flexible allocation" mixed fund, meaning it invests in a mix of stocks and bonds with the flexibility to adjust the asset allocation based on market conditions. The "(LOF)" designation indicates that it is a Listed Open-ended Fund, meaning it is traded on the stock exchange.
